title: QA Sessions Schema
description: Schema for qa_sessions stored in graph.meta.qa_sessions

question.description: The question text presented to the user

answer.description: User's answer to the question (null if skipped)

answered.description: True if the question was answered

skipped.description: True if the question was skipped

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the question was answered or skipped

alternatives.description: Alternative approaches or options to consider

challenges.description: Common challenges or pitfalls to be aware of

examples.question: What is the primary purpose of your application?
examples.answer: A real-time dashboard for monitoring fleet operations

examples.question: What data storage approach will you use?

expandedOptions.recommendations: Consider your data volume, query patterns, and consistency requirements
expandedOptions.alternatives: You could also consider managed services like AWS RDS or Google Cloud SQL
expandedOptions.tradeoffs: Relational databases offer consistency but may require more scaling effort
expandedOptions.challenges: Real-time data ingestion at scale can be challenging with traditional databases

examples.question: Who are the main users of this system?
